Terms of Service

The terms governing use of our website and services.

Use of Website

By accessing our website, you agree to these terms of service. If you do not agree, please do not use our website.

Intellectual Property

All content on this website — including text, graphics, logos, and educational materials — is the property of GEONEXUS unless otherwise noted. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without our prior written consent.

Services

Our consulting services are governed by separate engagement agreements. These terms apply only to website usage.

Disclaimer

The educational content on this website is provided for informational purposes only and does not constitute professional advice. While we strive for accuracy, we make no warranties regarding the completeness or reliability of the information.

Limitation of Liability

GEONEXUS shall not be liable for any damages arising from the use or inability to use this website or its content.

Governing Law

Contact

For questions about these terms, please contact us.

◆ GEONEXUS

GEO · AEO · AIO — Engineering the Future of AI-Discoverable Content

GEONEXUS is a next-generation agency and education platform specializing in Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), AI Engine Optimization (AEO), and Artificial Intelligence Optimization (AIO). We help enterprises architect, optimize, and future-proof their digital presence for the age of AI-driven discovery.
